rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees within annex agree blocks.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features only.
Equation and constant declarations in AGREE must use valid scalar types (int, real, bool).
Assignments in AGREE are scoped to implementation-level annexes.
Avoid referencing AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Equations are declared as `eq name : type = expression;`.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not reference AADL timing properties directly in AGREE expressions without model exposure.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their automatic scope in AGREE
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
